response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior/staff-level individual contributor with solid backend depth and some recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the role is an executive CTO position with hard requirements he does not meet: there is no evidence of senior technical leadership, no track record of scaling an engineering organization from 10 to 30+ people, no production multi-agent AI systems operated in regulated environments, and no experience governing hybrid or outsourced engineering models. His fintech exposure (RIDE Capital) was as a senior developer for about 15 months, not in a leadership or AI capacity.
strengths: Genuine distributed-systems depth, including low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Broad, sustained shipping record across web, mobile, embedded, and open-source, with strong testing and craftsmanship discipline
concerns: No people-management or organizational leadership experience; career is entirely individual-contributor roles plus a small side-project founding
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, LLM evaluation, or ML infrastructure experience beyond very recent tooling contributions
No experience with regulated-environment AI, credit/risk systems architecture, vendor governance, or board-level communication

key_factors.factor: No senior leadership or team-scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI systems experience
